notes: Excellent work. Agent identified all 13 major substantive speakers in order of appearance with accurate roles and affiliations. Key points are specific and precise (e.g., 800+ AARO cases, 2-5% anomalous, 45,000 daily FAA flights, 3-5 monthly UAP reports historically, spike to 68 in Feb 2023). Quotes are well-chosen and capture core messages. Organization is exemplary with chronological ordering, clear headers, bulleted points, block quotes, and added value via Panel Q&A and Cross-Cutting Themes sections. Minor deductions only for slightly verbose output (though reflects completeness) and two speaker entries in the Q&A section could arguably have been elevated to full entries. Overall professional-quality summary that accurately reflects the meeting content.
